name: Chocolate Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the softened cream cheese and sugar; beat well.
3. Add cocoa, scraping sides of the bowl frequently.
4. Blend in eggs and vanilla extract.
5. Mix in whipping cream.
6. Pour the mixture into the crust.
7. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, until the center is soft but sets upon cooling.
8. Allow to cool to room temperature.
9. Cover and chill several hours or overnight.
10. Garnish with cherry pie filling.
11. Serve 6 to 8 portions.
